name: Links Club
address: Ocean Avenue &, Mission St Suite 101, Carmel-By-The-Sea, CA 93921
about: Links Club is a sports bar and entertainment venue in Carmel, California, featuring high-tech golf simulators with PXG clubs and Trackman technology. The venue operates seven days a week for 10 hours daily, offering bucket list golf courses on over 300 simulator courses and a VIP private event space for groups. Dining options include a chef-driven menu with seasonal creations and a curated selection of local wines and 10 craft beers on tap. It is suitable for casual play, practice, private events, and corporate gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 300+ world-famous golf courses with LIDAR drone-mapped accuracy
VIP private event space accommodating up to 25 people with dedicated simulator
PGA Professional instruction available for private and group lessons
PXG club fitting and premium Trackman simulator technology
Daily events and free competitions for added entertainment

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-driven, from-scratch menu with seasonal creations
10 craft beers on tap, local curated wine selection, and craft cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: High-tech simulator bays for practice and play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, PXG clubs are provided for use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, as the venue offers its own chef-driven menu and bar with local wines and craft beers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: League teams play 9 holes per session within a 2-hour time frame, with a triple bogey for any unfinished holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Links Club is primarily a sports bar and entertainment venue focused on golf, dining, and adult-oriented events, making it more suitable for adults and older teens.
